text: As I stand in this stark, brightly lit corridor, the coldness of the glass wall before me separates me from the inviting, vibrant interior beyond. There is an uncanny sense of waiting; I am simultaneously outside and on the verge of entering a realm dedicated to curiosity and innovation. The institutional trappings—fire safety equipment, warning signs—contrast with the promise of something imaginative and new just past the barrier. I feel anticipation, as if paused between safety and discovery, and wonder what ideas will greet me on the other side.
